task_4_1_grouping_prompt: You are a software requirements engineering assistant. You are given cleaned Google Play app reviews for a mental health app. Group the reviews into 5 meaningful thematic groups. The groups must be similar but not identical to manual grouping. Each group must represent a common theme, include several related review IDs, and include two short example review summaries. Use only the reviews provided. Return valid JSON only in this exact format: {"groups": [{"group_id": "G1", "theme": "...", "review_ids": ["minddoc_1", "minddoc_2"], "example_reviews": ["...", "..."]}]}
task_4_2_persona_prompt: You are a software requirements engineering assistant. Based on the grouped review themes, generate one persona per group. Each persona must reference the review group it was derived from and follow the personas_manual.json style. Return valid JSON only in this exact format: {"personas": [{"id": "PA1", "name": "...", "description": "...", "derived_from_group": "G1", "goals": ["..."], "pain_points": ["..."], "context": ["..."], "constraints": ["..."], "evidence_reviews": ["minddoc_1", "minddoc_2"]}]}
